input.one_liner: Defensive quality core with low risk, weak reversion potential.
input.ranking_interpretation: Quality Classic top 10% and Diversification top 6% define the picture — fundamental solidity and low risk are clearly in the foreground. Alpha and Trend Momentum are top 25% and above average respectively, meaning a healthy but not spectacular momentum profile. Value Alpha Potential in the bottom 25% indicates the stock is running near its rolling-max alpha — limited setback potential.
input.sweet_spot_explanation: 4 of 5 models top 25% (Quality, Alpha, Trend, Diversification). Robust ranking across model boundaries.
key_risks: Style rotation out of defensives would be a headwind
